name: 提交联系表单
code:
<?php
$name = trim((string) ($payload['name'] ?? ''));
$message = trim((string) ($payload['message'] ?? ''));

if ($name === '' || $message === '') {
    return ['code' => 422, 'message' => 'name 和 message 为必填项'];
}

$tableName = $prefix . '_mc_contact_message';
$db->table($tableName)->insert([
    'name' => $name,
    'company' => (string) ($payload['company'] ?? ''),
    'phone' => (string) ($payload['phone'] ?? ''),
    'email' => (string) ($payload['email'] ?? ''),
    'budget_range' => (string) ($payload['budget_range'] ?? ''),
    'source_page' => (string) ($payload['source_page'] ?? ''),
    'message' => $message,
    'processed' => 0,
    'created_at' => now(),
    'updated_at' => now(),
]);

return ['ok' => true, 'message' => '咨询信息已提交，我们会尽快联系你'];
